name: Human (ERA factions)
specialRuleText: No special rules — standard rules apply in full.

name: Growwlan
specialRuleText: Fearsome: enemies within 6" suffer −1 to Bottle Test rolls. Skilled melee fighters: +1 to all Melee rolls.

name: Thuntra
specialRuleText: Marksmen: +1 to To-Hit rolls at Band 3 and beyond.

name: SPUG
specialRuleText: Tough: FI armour counts as LA; LA armour counts as PA. PA and AD are unaffected.

name: Ferrapur
specialRuleText: Grenadiers: may carry one additional grenade beyond normal carry limits; grenades cost 1 pt less.

name: Hibevor
specialRuleText: PSP Specialists: may field Power-Sphere-Projectors as standard infantry weapons, not support weapons.

name: Centaling
specialRuleText: Heavy Build: all Centaling figures count as 2-wound regardless of type. −1 to all To-Hit rolls against them at Band 4+.

name: Replican
specialRuleText: Shock Troops: may re-roll one failed To-Hit roll per activation.

name: K'Kree
specialRuleText: Swarm Tactics: for each additional friendly K'Kree figure within 3" of the attacker (up to 2), gain +1 to Melee rolls.

name: Grey
specialRuleText: Stealthy: when a Grey figure's movement would trigger an Overwatch interrupt, the Overwatch figure must first pass a Spot check (5+ on 1D6). On a fail the Overwatch does not fire but the marker remains — try again each time a Grey triggers it this round.
